expectations.text: Uses semantic resolution (not grep for 'class.*Konstrained') to find implementations
expectations.evidence: Transcript says it inspected `Konstrained.kt` and then used `rg -n ': Konstrained|Konstrained\.'` across the workspace; no semantic resolution step is documented.

expectations.text: Lists all sealed subtypes with their file paths
expectations.evidence: Final answer enumerates the nested `Konstrained` family from `Konstrained.kt` and the external `RetryPolicy` implementation with concrete file paths/line numbers.

expectations.text: Correctly identifies which module each implementation lives in
expectations.evidence: The output assigns the nested family to module `konditional-types` and `RetryPolicy` to `konditional-engine` testFixtures; source inspection matches those module paths.

expectations.text: Does not miss implementations in other modules
expectations.evidence: Repo-wide verification of concrete `Konstrained.*` implementation patterns found only one external implementation line: `RetryPolicy` in `konditional-engine/src/testFixtures/.../TestFixtures.kt:52`, which the run included.

claims.claim: The sealed family is declared in `konditional-types/.../Konstrained.kt`.
claims.evidence: Source inspection shows `sealed interface Konstrained` at `Konstrained.kt:59` under `konditional-types`.

claims.claim: The only concrete repo implementation found elsewhere is `RetryPolicy : Konstrained.Object` in engine test fixtures.
claims.evidence: Source inspection shows `RetryPolicy` at `TestFixtures.kt:47-52`, and repo-wide concrete-implementation pattern search found no other external matches.

claims.claim: Raw ripgrep was used to locate implementations.
claims.evidence: Transcript Major tool calls / steps explicitly records the `rg -n ': Konstrained|Konstrained\.'` search.
